signals.headline: Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**

Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin has completed its official full-scale launch across both the XRP Ledger and Ethereum as of mid-April 2026.[2] This deployment represents a major infrastructure milestone enabling broader payment use cases and institutional integration.

signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**

signals.headline: XRP ETF Approvals Entering Final Approval Stage | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Approvals Entering Final Approval Stage | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP ETF approvals are reported to be in their final stages, with institutional adoption described as "at an all-time high."[2] While not yet approved, the progression suggests imminent regulatory clearance.
